zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x於1259年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾時，她的父親Richard Wrenbury26歲，母親Catherine de Courtenay24歲。她於1276年與Phillip de Egerton在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國爾馬爾帕斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x于1259年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布洛爾时，她的父亲Richard Wrenbury26岁，母亲Catherine de Courtenay24岁。她于1276年与Phillip de Egerton在英国英格兰爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年在英国英格兰爾艾格頓享年59岁，埋葬在英国爾馬爾帕斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x was born in 1259, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Wrenbury, was 26 and her mother, Catherine de Courtenay, was 24. She married Phillip de Egerton in 1276, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1318, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Malpas, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x est née en 1259, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Wrenbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Courtenay, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Phillip d’Egerton en 1276, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x 1259 in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Wrenbury 26 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Courtenay 24. Sie hat 1276 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Phillip de Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Malpas, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x è nata il nel 1259 nel Blore, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Wrenbury, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Courtenay, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Phillip de Egerton nel 1276, nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1318, nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Malpas, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret De Wrenbury xが1259年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父Richard Wrenburyは26歳，母Catherine de Courtenayは24歳であった。1276年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでPhillip de Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで59歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x(이)가 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Wrenbury(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Courtenay(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 Phillip de Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 맬파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x nasceu em 1259, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Wrenbury, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Courtenay, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Phillip de Egerton em 1276, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x родилась в 1259 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Wrenbury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Courtenay, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Phillip de Egerton в 1276 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности малпас, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x nació en 1259, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Wrenbury, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catherine de Courtenay, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Phillip de Egerton en 1276, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1318, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
